title: deer-flow.cycle.wait.exit v1
description: Emitted by `deer cycle wait` when blocking on a stack-tuner cycle finishes — either because the cycle reached a TERMINAL_VERDICTS state (reason=terminal) or because the wait timed out (reason=timeout). Canonical CloudEvents-lite envelope: specversion/id/source/type/datacontenttype/time + payload nested under `data`. Producer: scripts/deer::_emit_bus_event / _cycle_wait (migrated off the legacy flat shape per nervous-bus-v737).

cycle_id.description: stack-tuner cycle id this wait was blocking on

elapsed_s.description: wall-clock seconds spent blocking (rounded to 1 decimal)

verdict.description: terminal-only — the TERMINAL_VERDICTS value the cycle reached (e.g. ship, abort, needs_pro_tuning)

cost_usd.description: terminal-only — cumulative cycle cost in USD
